welcomeTitle: TEMPLATE: A warm, one-line welcome that signals belonging before any criteria — e.g. 'You're in the right place.'
welcomeBody: TEMPLATE: Name that reaching out is hard and that they don't need to have it all figured out first — e.g. 'Reaching out can feel like a big step. You don't need to have everything worked out before you get in touch — we'll meet you wherever you are.'
startAltBody: TEMPLATE: Offer a lower-pressure way in for people who aren't ready to talk on the phone — e.g. 'You can email us instead, or send a message and we'll follow up however you're most comfortable.'
